$description: Component tokens for Mobile File Upload — an upload control with a drag/drop action zone and a list of file rows showing upload state. Each file row shows the file name, size, progress bar (during upload), and contextual action buttons (delete, retry). Supports 6 states: Default, Disabled, Active (files queued), In Progress (uploading), Completed, Error. Figma Reference: Node ID 445-25055

$component.name: File Upload
$component.description: A complete file upload control consisting of: (1) an Action Zone — the tap/drag-drop target area with an upload icon and label; (2) one or more File Rows — each showing a document icon, file name, file size, action buttons, and an upload progress bar. The Action Zone changes its border to primary/600 when active (file queued or uploading) and returns to gray when complete or errored. File Rows show different border colors, backgrounds, text colors, and action buttons depending on upload state.
$component.structure: Vertical flex column. Action Zone (always visible except when hidden by prop). File rows section (visible in Active, In Progress, Completed, Error states). Gap of 8px between Action Zone and file rows in these states.

state.Default: Action Zone only. White background, gray/200 border, gray/600 label text.
state.Disabled: Action Zone only. Gray/50 background, gray/200 border, gray/400 label text (muted).
state.Active: Action Zone (primary/600 border) + queued file rows. Files show 0% progress, disabled document icon.
state.In Progress: Action Zone (primary/600 border) + uploading file row. File row shows progress bar at current %, trash button.
state.Completed: Action Zone (gray border) + completed file row. File row shows success/green check button + trash button. No progress bar.
state.Error: Action Zone (gray border) + error file row. File row shows error/25 background, error/300 border, error-colored text, red trash + retry buttons.

variants.actionZone: boolean — whether the Action Zone is visible (true by default)

usage.contexts: File attachment fields, document upload flows, image pickers in forms.
usage.features: 6 upload states, inline progress bar, contextual action buttons (trash/check/retry), error and success feedback, SVG file type icon

with-files.description: Mobile file upload container gap between Action Zone and file rows — 8px (shown in Active, In Progress, Completed, and Error states)

without-files.description: Mobile file upload container gap when no file rows are present — 0px (Default and Disabled states show only the Action Zone)

action-zone.$comment: The tap/drag-drop target area. Bordered box with a cloud-upload icon and a text label.

padding.description: Mobile file upload action zone padding - 8px on all sides (p-[8px])

gap.description: Mobile file upload action zone gap between icon container and label text - 4px

border-radius.description: Mobile file upload action zone border radius - 8px

width.description: Mobile file upload action zone border width - 1px solid

default.description: Mobile file upload action zone border color for Default and Completed states - gray/200 - #eaecf0

active.description: Mobile file upload action zone border color for Active and In Progress states - primary/600 - #155eef (highlights the drop zone while uploading)

default.description: Mobile file upload action zone background for Default, Active, In Progress, Completed states - white

disabled.description: Mobile file upload action zone background for Disabled state - gray/50 - #f9fafb

icon-container.$comment: Circular gray background holding the upload-cloud icon

size.description: Mobile file upload action zone icon container size - 36px (width and height)

border-radius.description: Mobile file upload action zone icon container border radius - full circle (rounded-[18px] = half of 36px)

background.description: Mobile file upload action zone icon container background - gray/100 - #f2f4f7 (consistent across all active states)

name.description: Mobile file upload action zone icon name - upload-cloud-02 (20px, centered inside the 36px icon container)

size.description: Mobile file upload action zone icon size - 20px

typography.description: Mobile file upload action zone label typography - 11px Regular, 16px line-height (font/size/xs, font/weight/regular, font/line-height/xs)

default.description: Mobile file upload action zone label color for Default, Active, In Progress, Completed states - gray/600 - #475467

disabled.description: Mobile file upload action zone label color for Disabled state - gray/400 - #98a2b3

file-row.$comment: A single file item row showing the document icon, filename, size, action buttons, and progress bar.

padding.description: Mobile file upload file row padding - 8px on all sides

icon-to-content.description: Mobile file upload file row gap between document icon and content block - 4px

text-to-actions.description: Mobile file upload file row gap between text block (filename+size) and action button(s) - 8px

title-to-description.description: Mobile file upload file row gap between filename and file size / error description - 2px

header-to-progress.description: Mobile file upload file row gap between the header row (text+actions) and the progress bar row - 4px (In Progress state only)

border-radius.description: Mobile file upload file row border radius - 8px

width.description: Mobile file upload file row border width - 1px solid

default.description: Mobile file upload file row border color for Queued, In Progress, Completed states - gray/200 - #eaecf0

error.description: Mobile file upload file row border color for Error state - error/300 - #fda29b

default.description: Mobile file upload file row background for Queued, In Progress, Completed states - white

error.description: Mobile file upload file row background for Error state - error/25 - #fffbfa (very light red tint)

file-icon.$comment: The 32px document type icon (SVG image asset — not CSS-rendered). Varies by upload state.

size.description: Mobile file upload document icon size - 32×32px (SVG image asset; visual appearance embedded in asset)

variants.description: Mobile file upload document icon variants: default (queued/in-progress), success (completed, not disabled), success-disabled (queued with success indicator), error (upload failed) — each is a separate SVG image asset

typography.description: Mobile file upload filename typography - 13px Medium, 18px line-height (font/size/md, font/weight/medium, font/line-height/md)

default.description: Mobile file upload filename color for default/in-progress/completed states - gray/700 - #344054

error.description: Mobile file upload filename color for Error state - error/600 - #d92d20

description.$comment: Second line below filename — shows file size normally, or error message in Error state

typography.description: Mobile file upload description typography - 12px Regular, 17px line-height (font/size/sm, font/weight/regular, font/line-height/sm)

default.description: Mobile file upload description color for default states (shows file size e.g. '200 KB') - gray/600 - #475467

error.description: Mobile file upload description color for Error state (shows 'Upload failed, please try again') - error/700 - #b42318

progress-bar.$comment: Upload progress bar shown below the filename row. Only visible in the In Progress state. Reuses the same 8px track as progress-bar.json but scoped to file upload context.

height.description: Mobile file upload progress bar height - 8px (both track and fill)

border-radius.description: Mobile file upload progress bar border radius - fully rounded pill (rounded-[64px])

color.description: Mobile file upload progress bar track color - gray/200 - #eaecf0 (unfilled portion)
Mobile file upload progress bar fill color - primary/600 - #155eef (filled portion showing upload progress)

width.description: Mobile file upload progress percentage label fixed width - 32px (right-aligned; accommodates '100%' text)

typography.description: Mobile file upload progress percentage label typography - 13px Medium, 18px line-height

color.description: Mobile file upload progress percentage label color - gray/700 - #344054

alignment.description: Mobile file upload progress percentage label text alignment - right

action-button.$comment: Circular icon buttons shown on the right side of each file row. Button type (trash/check/retry) and background color change with upload state.

size.description: Mobile file upload action button size - 36×36px (width and height)

border-radius.description: Mobile file upload action button border radius - full circle (rounded-[18px] = half of 36px)

size.description: Mobile file upload action button icon size - 20px (centered inside the 36px circular button)

default.description: Mobile file upload action button background for default actions (trash/delete, retry) - gray/100 - #f2f4f7

success.description: Mobile file upload action button background for the success/check action (Completed state) - success/100 - #d1fadf

error.description: Mobile file upload action button background for error-state delete action - error/100 - #fee4e2

delete.description: Mobile file upload delete action icon name - trash-01 (shown in In Progress state with gray/100 bg; in Error state with error/100 bg)

success.description: Mobile file upload success action icon name - check-circle (shown in Completed state with success/100 bg)

retry.description: Mobile file upload retry action icon name - refresh-ccw-01 (shown in Error state with gray/100 bg)

by-state.description: Mobile file upload action button arrangement by state: In Progress shows trash only; Completed shows success-check then trash; Error shows red-trash then retry
